rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Grant - no opposition filed. Moving party is awarded $325.00 in attorneys fees plus $40.00 in costs. Moving party to submit proposed order. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate cortroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on June 15, 2011.
